datapipeline.pipeline.pipelinetag.CfnAbo: A list of arbitrary tags (key-value pairs) to associate with the pipeline, which you can use to control permissions. For more information, see [Controlling Access to Pipelines and Resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/datapipeline/latest/DeveloperGuide/dp-control-access.html) in the *AWS Data Pipeline Developer Guide*.

datapipeline.pipeline.pipelinetag.Key.Description: The key name of a tag.

datapipeline.pipeline.pipelinetag.Value.Description: The value to associate with the key name.
